summary: M327 — Bug-fix follow-up: appearance default-unlock now driven by starter classes (warrior/fighter/ranger/rogue/mage) instead of alphabetical sort position (Bard/Chronomancer/Cleric was wrong). Gender filter is now display-only — toggling Male/Female no longer changes which appearances are unlocked. Fame is now GLOBAL (localStorage emberveil_fame_global_v1) so unlocks persist across saves and new games. HireBuilderScreen class cards now use the same wrap-friendly CSS as CharacterBuilderScreen (mobile no longer ellipses 'Paladin' to 'Holy Warrior'). New public/docs/supabase-setup.md covering migration order, application options, verification, rollback — linked from /assets/docs.html under a new Backend section.
